race.description: Book A July Hospitality Package CB Maiden Hcp
race.comment: ARCHIE MAXIMUS (2) handy gelding who gets his chance today third-up from the good gate. Covered ground in a stronger contest with a respectable third over 1200m at the Gold Coast. No excuses here. WILD MONARCH (6) closed strongly on debut with a tidy third over 1000m at this track in a tougher race. Awkward map today and look for him closing well. Each way. AMAZIGH TORQUE (4) safely held on debut with a plugging third over 1100m at this track in a tougher race. Well drawn and will keep improving as she gets out in trip. Place best. SOOFREE (10) returns after eight months in the paddock. Never comfortable in the heavy (8) going with a dismal eighth over 1200m at Port Macquarie last August. Back without a trial and no surprise to see her finish in the minor placings.
